summary_en: 2,300,000 shares (0.90% of shares outstanding), ¥6.72B maximum, ToSTNeT-3 trading, May 15, 2026, 8:45 AM JST, settlement same day. Part of ¥12.0B authorization (5,200,000 shares, 2.04% S/O) for May 15–Aug 31, 2026.
title_en: Notice of Treasury Share Acquisition via Off-Hours Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: On May 14, 2026, Nippon Television Holdings' board approved specific terms for a portion of a previously authorized treasury share buyback program. The company will execute an off-hours block trade (ToSTNeT-3) on May 15, 2026 at 8:45 AM JST at the closing price of ¥2,921/share. The block purchase covers up to 2,300,000 shares (0.90% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) for a maximum aggregate consideration of ¥6.72B. This block constitutes part of the broader ¥12.0B authorization approved the same day, which permits acquisition of up to 5,200,000 shares (2.04% S/O) over the period May 15–August 31, 2026 via ToSTNeT-3 and open-market purchases. Results will be announced immediately after the trading window closes. The block order is valid only for that specific trading session; full or partial execution is not guaranteed.
